title: Phase 3: Core UI & Navigation

title: Phase 5: Command Center (Cmd+K Search)
description: Implement fuzzy search across all 252+ commands and documentation.

title: Dashboard Sharing MVP - share button, proxy, OG tags
description: Implement Loom-style frictionless sharing for video dashboards. Phase 1: Share button on ProjectCard with copy-link, Firestore share docs with visibility (private/unlisted/public), Cloud Run proxy endpoint that checks permissions and serves HTML from GCS with injected OG meta tags. Phase 2: Deep-link anchors, view analytics, 'Powered by Clarity Engine' footer. Council consensus: unlisted-by-default, no auth required for viewers, OG tags non-negotiable.
close_reason: Completed: share button, /s/:shareId proxy with OG tags, powered-by footer in dashboards, deployed to production

title: Notification Suite: Weekly Verse Digest
description: Friday evening digest. Summarizes all 5 daily verses from the week, topics, best quotes, weekly synthesis. Email only.

title: Fix ai-history RAG ingestion - set up cron
description: The ai-history ingestion pipeline (ai-history ingest-opencode CLI) is manual and was last run ~Jan 1. New conversations are not being indexed into Qdrant. Set up a cron job or systemd timer to run ingestion daily. Verify Voyage 3.5 embeddings match existing ai_memory collection.
close_reason: Created systemd user timer (every 6h) + service. First run processing ~20K backlogged chunks. Timer active at ai-history-ingest.timer.

title: Fix critical production bugs: schema normalization, anemia suppression, clinical type gating
description: Phase 1 of production bug fixes. Fix K: Add normalizeAiResult() adapter in Code.gs to bridge flat Gemini schema to nested internal schema (fixes Unknown Patient, missing DOB, Unknown Sender). Fix C: Change assessAnemia() null case from severity:'unknown' to 'none' and harden display predicate. Fix D: Add CLINICAL_FAX_TYPES whitelist in Config.gs, gate computeClinicalIntelligence() call in Gemini.gs. Council-reviewed plan with 6 LLMs.
close_reason: Completed: Phase 1 critical bug fixes (K+C+D) — normalizeAiResult, anemia suppression, clinical type gating

title: Research AirBnB listings near Hyatt Regency Atlanta
description: Search for 9+ guest homes in Castleberry Hill, Downtown, or Old Fourth Ward within 1.5 miles of 265 Peachtree St NE for April 15-19, 2026. Document top 3-5 options with pricing.
close_reason: Completed: Found 5 properties, top pick is Historic Duplex (9BR, 18 guests, $400-600/night). Updated travel plan with booking links and comparison table.

title: Finalize early departure plan for 2 people
description: Decide whether the 2 people leaving early will: (A) Leave evening of April 16th to Memphis, or (B) Leave afternoon of April 17th to Jackson. Book appropriate transportation.

title: Anki/Flashcard Export from extracted concepts
description: Auto-generate spaced repetition flashcards from validated concepts. Include video timestamp links on card backs. Types: definition cards, why/how cards, cloze deletions from transcript, spot-the-misconception cards. Export as .apkg files (via genanki) or in-app study mode. Council consensus: turns passive consumption into retained knowledge.

title: Implement command parser for Google Chat
description: Create commands.ts to parse user messages and identify commands (/add, /queue, /status, /cancel, /help). Extract YouTube URLs from text when user @mentions the bot without explicit command. Support slash commands and @mentions. Return structured command objects with action, url (if present), and parameters. Must handle edge cases: @mention without URL, malformed URLs, unknown commands. Write comprehensive tests.

title: Stripe Subscription Billing Integration
description: Integrate Stripe for SaaS subscription billing. Endpoints: POST /checkout/create (Checkout Session), POST /billing/portal (Customer Portal), POST /webhooks/stripe (webhook handler). Handle events: checkout.session.completed, customer.subscription.updated, invoice.payment_failed. Store stripeCustomerId + subscriptionStatus on user doc. Pricing page in React frontend. Tiers: Free (3-5 videos/mo), Pro ($10-20/mo unlimited), Team ($50+/mo).

'What are the competing explanations for X across my last 20 videos?' — answer includes claim, source video, timestamp(s), and contradictory sources. Builds on existing Qdrant infrastructure.

title: Share to Clarity Engine - Mobile (Capacitor)
description: Build Capacitor native wrapper for iOS/Android Share Sheet integration. Users share YouTube links FROM any app INTO Clarity Engine. Android: Intent filter for ACTION_SEND text/plain. iOS: Share Extension with Firebase Auth token via App Group. Minimal UI: 'Queued for processing' + optional tag picker. Push notification via FCM when dashboard ready. Also add iOS Shortcut as power-user fallback. Council consensus: PWA alone insufficient (iOS doesn't support Web Share Target in share sheet).
